integration_validation_v2.evidence: QuietFlags (no_focus_steal/no_foreground/no_taskbar/no_global_shortcut/no_synthetic_input) default ON; create_stealth_window rejects non-quiet windows outside audited ForegroundExceptionBound (src/atelier/stealth_window.rs:129-188,433-443,511-545) + synthetic_input_guard persisted (settings.rs:1534). Real-PG test rejects inverted no_foreground window and asserts event count (tests/atelier_stealth_window_tests.rs:1286-1314).

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
